title: Iran War Live Updates: Pakistan’s Shuttle Diplomacy Unfolds in Tehran
summary_full: Pakistan’s foreign ministry said it expected to host a second round of U.S.-Iran talks but did not say when, as a Pakistani delegation visited the Iranian capital.
summary_public: Pakistan’s foreign ministry said it expected to host a second round of U.S.-Iran talks but did not say when, as a Pakistani delegation visited the Iranian capital.
